text.title: Reflexion Learning Worked Example
text.summary: End-to-end worked example showing inputs → procedure → output for a typical instance of Reflexion Learning.

example.scenario: Agent fails to validate methodology JSON because owner field is null. Episode: failure_summary='owner null', root_cause='input parser stripped placeholders', corrective_rule='reject artefact when owner in {team, we, null}'. Next attempt sees the rule and rejects upfront.
